hooks.command: f=$(node -e 'let d="";process.stdin.on("data",c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on("end",()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(d);process.stdout.write(j.tool_response?.filePath||j.tool_input?.file_path||"")}catch(e){}})'); case "$f" in *.tsx|*.jsx|*.ts|*.js) npx prettier --write "$f" && npx eslint --fix "$f" ;; *.md|*.mdx) npx prettier --write "$f" ;; esac 2>/dev/null || true
